disclaimer.title: Advisory only
disclaimer.body: Advisory only. Calculations provide conservative reference values for Boeing 787 operations. Final operational decisions must always be based on official Boeing FCOM/QRH and your operator's procedures. Not for primary navigation or operational use.

mainMenu.title: Modules
mainMenu.activeModuleDescription: Max crosswind for takeoff based on weight, CG, RWYCC, aircraft variant.
mainMenu.allHidden: All modules hidden. Open Settings to re-enable.

crosswind.errorDataCondition: No data available for the selected runway condition.
crosswind.errorPhaseMismatch: Bundled data does not match the requested flight phase.
crosswind.errorOutOfLookup: Inputs cannot be evaluated by the lookup table. Adjust inputs.

about.title: About
about.disclaimer: This application provides advisory calculations only. All values represent conservative reference based on publicly available aircraft characteristics and operational practice. They do not replace official Boeing FCOM, QRH, AFM, or operator-specific OM-A/OM-B documentation. Always verify before operational use.

error.referenceDataDescription: The application could not load reference data. Please contact support and reinstall the app.
